productName: Wildside Beverage Blueberry Acai Indica MAX Shot 2:1:1 THC:CBD:CBN - 2oz
description: A refreshing sweet, ripe blueberry infused beverage with bright café-style flavor, smooth sweetness, and an easy-drinking cannabis finish. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest in a 2:1:1 ratio. A refreshing hybrid option for customers who prefer their cannabis in a drinkable format.
